series_description: Documents pertaining to public requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor, redacted and un-redacted responsive records. Maintained to document compliance with public records law obligations (
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years

series_description: Correspondence seeking information, direction, assistance, or referral to appropriate entities, or correspondence of a general nature between DODD and other state agencies, county boards of DD, clients, guardians, individuals, companies etc. Correspondence with legislators and their offices on behalf of their constituents. Includes plans, follow up, and details.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 1 year after resolution or response. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically

series_title: Department Conducted Training- Evaluations and Attendance
series_description: Evaluations, feedback, comments regarding Department conducted trainings or seminars. Attendance sheets from Department trainings and seminars.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Material used in trainings, seminars, presentations (i.e. Powerpoint Presentations, handouts, outlines) presented by the Department to providers, stakeholder groups, guardians, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: Reference copies of state and federal legislation of interest to an agency, including proposed legislation, regardless of whether the legislation was passed. Inclusive of working documents in the formulation or support/opposition to the legislation, correspondence, and any other related support documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Any meetings that do not constitute official public meetings with an agenda/minutes/sign-in sheet held within DODD and other State Agencies, County Boards of DD, Clients and/or Guardians.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for two years.

series_description: Reports on legislation prepared for the Governor's Office regarding legislation with the potential to impact DODD.
retention_statement: Electronic: One year after date of the report.

series_description: WFC Reports (BI reports): comprehensive workforce statistical summary by race/sex-divided into categories: Class/Salary; New Hire; Promotions/Reassignments; Separations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for four years.

series_title: Civil Rights and Title VII Files
series_description: DAS EEO/OCRC/EEOC Discrimination Complaints.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 7 years after closure of complaint.

series_description: Affirmative Action Plans.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after superseded by a new plan.

series_description: Monthly Discrimination Complaint Activity Reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: Employee Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) reasonable accommodation files.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 7 years after employee separation.

series_description: Encumbrances, Controlling Board request and attachments, vouchers, payment requests, accounting ledgers, ISTVs, encumbrance and voucher logs, reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for seven years after project complete and all audit issues resolved.

series_description: Pay-in Forms, Checks and supporting documentation for deposits made to the treasure of state.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 7 years after completion of initiated audit.

series_description: Payment card application packets and cancellation packets.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one year after purchasing authority cancelled. ; Paper: Retain for one year after purchasing authority cancelled or until scanned and saved electronically

series_description: Purchase requisitions, purchase orders, purchasing backup documents, reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 7 years or until completion of an initiated audit.

series_description: Quarterly reports, monthly reconciliations, replenishment vouchers, receipts, invoices.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years or until completion of an initiated audit.

series_description: Vouchers, ISTVs, Payment Card Logs, Reports, Batch Voucher Ledgers, EDI payment documentation, Payment Journal Adjustments, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years or until completion of an initiated audit.

series_description: Operating and capital budget submissions, preparation and presentation documents for biennium budgets.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: Bank Statements, TOS reports, Medicaid reports, Cognos reports, CBOSS reports, and MITS reports for monthly revenue reconciliations.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years, or until completion of an initiated audit.

series_description: Voyager reports, fuel and maintenance receipts, lease agreements, replacement plans, vehicle assignments and parking pass assignments.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years or until completion of an initiated audit.

series_description: Asset addition requests, asset retirement files, surplus turn in documents, annual fiscal certifications, and biennial physical inventory certifications.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years or until completion of an initiated audit.

series_title: Ohio Developmental Disability Profile Assessments for Intermediate Care Facilities (DDP-ICF)
series_description: The ODDP-ICF assessment completed when a new resident is admitted to an intermediate care facility. Includes supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years.

series_title: Residential Provider Resources and Supports Documentation
series_description: Referral forms, provider support action plans, tracking, reports, and other documentation created in providing supports to residential providers.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: Documentation required for Intermediate Care Facility cost reports, including communications, supporting documents, clarifications, and resubmission of cost reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for the later of either 10 years or until after the completion of an initiated audit.

series_description: Assessments utilized for rate setting prior to the DDP-ICF.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 10 years.

series_description: Inpatient day reports, bed counts, invoices, monthly and quarterly records submitted for determination of the franchise permit fee.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for ten years.

series_description: Licensure development applications, correspondence regarding applications, approval or denial letters, development rule waiver documentation (requests for waivers and approval/ denial of waiver).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for five years from the effective date of development or rule waiver. If development or rule waiver was denied, five years from the date of the request.

series_description: Application for add-on rates, assessments related to add-on rates (CANS), letters and supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for ten years.

series_description: MUI reports, Investigation reports, supporting documentation for reports, plans of correction, supporting documentation, responses to plans of correction, joint investigation materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seven years or until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years.

series_description: Unusual Incident forms (completed). All the accident/incident records pertaining to clients, including investigation report and client restraint orders, etc., Unusual Incident Reports, security records and reports, absence without leave documentation, and restraining orders and documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seven years or until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years.

series_description: All documents gathered and completed in conjunction with complaint calls and letters, including any follow- up records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seven years or until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years.

series_description: Annual citations for centers, statements of deficiencies, plans of correction, Federal look-behind documentation, correspondence with CMS, medical complaint deficiencies, documents associated with on-going issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years.

series_title: Disability Rights Ohio Site Visit Reports
series_description: Reports and related materials in conjunction with site visits, site visit scheduling, reports from Disability Rights Ohio, responses to the reports.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years.

series_title: Quality Enhancement Developmental Center Internal Evaluations
series_description: Reports, correspondence, plans of correction, observation notes, general record review notes, interview notes, medication pass notes, health care services notes, environmental notes, operations notes, schedules.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: All records pertaining to Developmental Center Residents including: • Birth, Death, Admission and Discharge Documents • Court Records • Medical, dental, and any other clinical records • Client Evaluations • Records of personal belongings • All client funds records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seven years after death or discharge of client or until scanned and saved electronically. Deposit all records described in R.C. 5123.31(A) with the Ohio History Connection and shred all other records. ; Electronic: Retain for seven years after death or discharge of a client

series_description: Status reports related to Individuals moving from private ICFs, Information in CTS database entered following a Developmental Center Discharge Review or an ICF Discharge Review/Exit Waiver Follow-Along Service Review, and referral information submitted by community team and follow-up documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for ten years or until death of the individual.

series_description: Report submitted to community team following meeting assisting with individual that is struggling in their current home, as well as emails, voicemails, tracking and reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for ten years.

series_title: Transaction files for Medicaid Billing Claims and Payments.
series_description: Electronic
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for six years.

series_description: Visual Basic, SAS, ect. Object Codes for systems developed by the Department of Developmental Disabilities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years after the system is taken out of service.

series_description: Visual Basic, .asp, SAS, etc. source codes for the systems developed by the Department of Developmental Disabilities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years after the system is taken out of service.

series_description: System documentation for computer systems developed for the Ohio Department of Developmental Disabilities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years after the system is taken out of service.

series_title: Licenses and Contracts for all Hardware and Software
series_description: Software and Hardware licenses and contracts for all DODD hardware and software.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for fifteen years.

series_description: Monthly budget reports, ad hoc analysis and reports, calculations, allocations, reconciliations, and other budget analysis documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_title: Medicaid Administrative Claiming/Random Moment Time Study
series_description: Time studies, claim calculations, audit/desk review/monitoring documentation, implementation plans, emails related to these activities.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for seven years after audit and all issues resolved.

series_description: Grant agreements, invoices & expenditure reports, support documentation, RFPs, award letters, reports, draw requests, sole source letters, associated documentation and emails.
retention_statement: Electronic: Three years from the date of submission of the final expenditure report or, for Federal awards that are renewed quarterly or annually, from the date of the submission of the quarterly or annual financial report, respectively, as reported to the Federal awarding agency or pass-through entity in the case of a subrecipient.

series_description: DODD Security Affidavits forms, which identify a particular DODD systems user and the level of access that user and/or entity has to each of the application systems. Required for each DODD employee and any external entity accessing DODD applications and is renewed either annually or according to the renewal schedule in ITS Policy ITS-001.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically or pursuant to the following: DODD Employees: Retain for one year after end of employment. Provider: Retain for seven years after end of certification with DODD. Billing entity: Retain for seven years after termination of relationships with all DODD providers. County Board employees: Retain for seven years after the end date of employment with the County Board. County Boards: Retain for seven years after termination of the relationship between the County Board and DODD. MAIS Nurse: Retain for seven years after the nurse's credentials have expired in MAIS. MAIS Secretaries: Retain for seven years after end of all relationships with MAIS nurses. ; Electronic: DODD Employee: Retain for one year after end of employment. Provider: Retain for seven years after end of certification with DODD. Billing entity: Retain for seven years after termination of relationships with all DODD providers. County Board employees: Retain for seven years after the end date of employment with the County Board. County Boards: Retain for seven years after termination of the relationship between the County Board and DODD. MAIS Nurse: Retain for seven years after the nurse's credentials have expired in MAIS. MAIS Secretaries: Retain for seven years after end of all relationships with MAIS nurses.

series_title: Reasonable Accommodation Committee Requests for Accommodations and Decisions
series_description: Requests for accommodations submitted to the committee, clarification, and additional information provided in support of requests for reasonable accommodations, and official documentation of the committee’s decision on a request for a reasonable accommodation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for five years after end of employment.

series_title: Reasonable Accommodation Review Committee working documents
series_description: Internal communication Committee members’ comments and votes on accommodation requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until final decision on accommodation request. ; Electronic: Retain until final decision on accommodation request.

series_description: Application for employment for all applicants for each position posting (forms posted on bulletin board) rejection letters for candidates not selected, as well as a copy of who was selected, applicant data form.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years or until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: Advertisements placed in newspapers, professional journals, etc., to recruit employees for vacant positions.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: Employment applications for individuals not hired. Also includes vacancy postings - forms posted on the bulletin boards notifying personnel of vacant positions available.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: BCI (Bureau of Criminal Investigation) check results, supporting documents to evaluate information. Bureau of Motor Vehicle Driver Abstracts, records of 7 registry checks (e.g., Nurse Aid Registry verification, DODD Abuser Registry, Rehabilitation & Correction Check, etc.)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seven years or until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for seven years.

series_description: Vacancy postings and applications, resumes, civil service application and interview questions from applicants not hired.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: Employee personnel folders containing employee applications; personnel action's (e.g., promotions, reclassifications, etc.). Includes: Position description, litigation or Board of Review appeals records, misc. (e.g., training, emergency contact, new hire documents, commendations, etc.). This series may contain Social Security numbers that must be redacted before being released.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for seven years after employment ends or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for seven years after employment ends.

series_description: Files containing training material related to pre-discipline, investigations, supervising unionized employees, disability, Family Medical Leave Act, layoff, contract, grievance, travel and performance evaluation training.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: Drug test results received in accordance with State of Ohio Drug Free Workplace Programs and US Department of Transportation Omnibus Transportation Safety Act.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain positive tests for five years and all other test results for three years. ; Paper: Retain positive tests for five years and all other test results for three years, or until scanned and saved electronically.

series_description: Statements gathered during investigation, payroll documents, suspension order, pre-disciplinary notice and report.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for seven years. ; Paper: Retain for seven years, or until scanned and saved electronically.

series_description: Copies of unfair labor practice, statements, position statements from employee and employer.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until submitted to DAS. ; Electronic: Retain until submitted to DAS.

series_description: Discipline order, pre-disciplinary statements, documentation supporting infraction. Grievance form, discipline packet with discipline order and supporting statements, supporting documentation for grievance other than discipline - such as OT documents, harassment, leave usage, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for five years.

series_description: Office of Collective Bargaining Seniority lists, Director''s correspondence. Bumping Rights, Justification for Developmental Center closings and other related correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years ; Electronic: Retain for five years

series_description: Specific Pick-a-Post (work area agreements for the Developmental Centers). MOUs can be for anything not covered in the contract that the parties want to agree on (i.e. travel, established term irregular appointment).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years after expiration of MOU or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for two years after expiration of MOU.

series_title: Appeals under non-119 Complaint Resolution Rules
series_description: Attorney Case Files containing communications, documents, hearing files regarding appeals under non-119 complaint resolution rules, including OAC 5123:2-17-01 and 5123-4-04.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 10 years after the closure of the case.

series_description: Adjudication Orders signed by the Director regarding the Denial, Suspension, Revocation of certifications or licenses.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 25 years.

series_description: Attorney Case Files containing communications, documents, hearing files related to denials, suspensions, revocations, or terminations of supported living certificates/ residential facility licenses issued by the DODD, county board employee certification, medication certifications, overpayments or waiver review findings.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years after the closure of the case.

series_description: Files regarding the drafting of and review of proposed/effective administrative rules.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain until no longer of administrative value

series_title: Adjudication Orders issued under non-119 Complaint Resolution Rules.
series_description: Adjudication Orders signed by the Director and related Reports and Recommendations to the Director regarding appeals under non-119 complaint resolution rules, including OAC 5123:2-17-01 and 5123-4-04.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 25 years from date of the Adjudication Order.

series_description: Includes data related to several key indicators tracked by the agency including general demographics of people served, waiver counts, facility projects, technical assistance requests, call center information, and census counts
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain for 1 year.

series_description: Files regarding receivership filed by DODD pursuant to R.C. 5123.191 when conditions at a licensed facility may present a risk of harm to the residents.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 20 years after receivership closed.

series_description: Requests for waivers of administrative rules and waivers signed by the Director/ the Director’s designee.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years after the expiration of the waiver.

series_description: Internal OSSAS Protocols, including the compliance review, special review and sanction protocols
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain for 5 years after obsolete or superseded by new protocol.

series_description: OSSAS county list, phone list and regional maps
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain until superseded.

series_description: Feasibility Study Form, Licensure Fee Scale and documents related to feasibility study
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years.

series_description: Files from County Board Accreditation Reviews, including accreditation reports, Plans of Corrections and Plan of Correction Verifications
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years after completion of review.

series_description: 777 guidelines for RDS, 777 process outside of RDS, 777 worksheet
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain until superseded.

series_description: All records created or maintained by Department employees while conducting regular or special compliance reviews including: Special review referral forms, Staff lists and rosters, individual lists, sample keys, communications, immediate citation forms, pictures, scanned documents, service documents, on-site itinerary exit conference record, provider acknowledgment, exit conference recording, citation reports, Plan of Correction and Plan of Correction Verification forms, County Board citation documentation, and files for non-responsive providers including documentation of 777 process.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years after the completion of the review.

series_description: Forms created by the Department for conducting compliance reviews, including: Required Documents lists, review tools, individual interview tools, reviewer worksheets and crosswalks, and checklists .
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain for 6 years after superseded.

series_description: Medicaid fraud referral forms and supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years after submission of referral.

series_description: Documentation created or maintained in support of provider monitoring.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain for 6 years.

series_description: Incident reports, witness statements, ISPs, exhibits, photo, video, audio recordings or other documents relied upon in the MUI Investigative Report.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain for seven years or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Maintain for seven years.

series_description: Surveys used to evaluate internal and external “customer” satisfaction, measure outcomes, and develop performance measures and benchmarks, as well as the compilation of answers, used to upgrade, monitor, or improve existing services within the agency. Includes National Core Indicators, state administered.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year after completion of the survey and related analysis, or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after completion of the survey and related analysis.

series_description: Records created by the Policy and Strategic Direction Division that document the research and analysis related to DODD policies for eligibility, services covered and system design.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for the later of either 5 years or until policy is superseded or obsolete.

series_title: Policy Advocacy, Committee, Family Advisory, or Taskforce work groups
series_description: Documents include policy advocacy or taskforce work group materials and products including but not limited to: Letters, memos, meeting agendas and minutes, reports which may include information regarding individuals with developmental disabilities who are receiving or seeking to receive services from a County Board of DODD.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_title: Technical Assistance for employment, regional teams, family advisories, and technology.
series_description: Records pertaining to Technical Assistance and/or intervention or support provided by the Department in the areas of employment, regional teams, family advisories, and technology.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: Metadata about systems with documentation on how to access, retrieve, manipulate, and interpret data including data element dictionary, file layout, code book or table, and other records that explain the meaning, purpose, structure, logical relationships, and origin of the data elements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system's or application's data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format.

series_description: Plans for campaigns, project tracker work flow information, event briefings, work proposals. Communications containing plans/ strategies/ approval requests to Governor's Office.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years.

series_description: Webpages devoted to particular programs. Saved through website archives.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years.

series_description: Includes photographs (negatives, prints, slides, transparencies, and related items), audio, and video recordings from events, staff photos, interviews and graphic designs. Also includes any corresponding logs or indices. Does not include records scheduled according to content such as surveillance/security video or recordings of hearings/meetings.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in agency for two years

series_description: Lists maintained of subscribers to DODD publications.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until discontinuance of publication.

series_description: Press releases sent to the media
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in agency for two years

series_description: Media Inquiries, Responses, Related Documentation
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years from date of response.

series_description: Recorded and posted Podcasts
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 1 year from date of posting.

series_description: Memo Monday, Family Connection, Director’s Corner, DSP Connection, Tech First, Early Intervention, Health and Welfare Alerts, Pipeline
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in agency for two years

series_title: Advocacy and Protective Services, Inc ("APSI") Documents
series_description: All completed APSI guardian review forms
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years.

series_description: Entire Abuser Registry case file, including any hearing files.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically, or until person is removed from the Abuser Registry. ; Electronic: Retain until person is removed from the Abuser Registry.

series_description: Documents created and/ or reviewed by the Morbidity and Mortality Committee.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years.

series_title: Policy and Strategic Analysis Research Projects
series_description: Research projects (either DODD along or with other agencies or third parties) on relevant topics like employment issues in the developmentally disabled field, the ID/D population, or program evaluations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in agency for five years

series_title: Policy Guidance, Toolkits, and related information.
series_description: Documents related to policy implementation and guidance from DODD including Toolkits, guidance published on-line or provided to stakeholders.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after discontinuance of the policy

series_description: Children’s Records under the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA). Including Payor of Last Resort child records, and Evidence and Disposition of complaints.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain until child’s 9th birthday.

series_title: Individual with Disabilities Education Act (“IDEA”) County Records
series_description: County technical assistance and training plans for the implementation of IDEA, letters and memos regarding the issuance of a finding, corrective action plan, and performance improvement plan for noncompliance with requirements of IDEA.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_title: Federal Correspondence to the Department regarding Early Intervention Program.
series_description: Federal correspondence to the Director of DODD regarding the Early Intervention Program including notices of award, application approvals, annual performance report results.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: DODD-produced federal reporting (annual performance reports, state performance plan, 619 reporting, etc.) required by Individuals with Disabilities Education Act.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 8 years.

series_title: Early Intervention Service Coordinator and Service Coordinator Supervisor credentials
series_description: Initial and renewal applications for credentials issued under Ohio Adm. Code 5123-10-04.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 6 years.

series_description: Records to further the initiatives developed to enhance the Self-Determination initiative. Documents may include brochures, handouts, presentation materials, group discussion meeting minutes, and project goals.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_title: Medicaid Billing Systems and Claims Data
series_description: Medicaid Claims data and documentation created during submission, processing, and payment of Medicaid waiver services.
retention_statement: Electronic: Electronic- Retain for 7 years or until completion of an initiated audit.

series_description: Assessment submitted to DODD for waiver waiting list.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until individual is removed from the waiting list.

series_description: Includes information gathered for the purpose of conducting State Appeal Hearings for individuals denied or having services reduced that were issued due process. Information may include appeal summaries, statistical and/or demographic information about individuals served by DODD, applicable rule citations, information about the state and/or county board programs or services and supporting documentation.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 6 years.

series_description: Records include information on Delegated Nursing training records, certification records, information regarding medications (side effects, interactions, contraindications, etc.), health related information (brochures, conferences, intervention techniques, etc.), and other such material related to nursing, delegated nursing, and general health care.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: Denial letters and files, including internal communications regarding possible denials.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: This includes the form and all related documentation to inform individuals of options and their rights to decide on placement into a large intermediate care facility (ICF).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: Assessments of individuals regarding to necessary level of care, funding. This includes the Preadmission Screening/Resident Review (PASRR), Level of Care (LOC) Assessment, Developmental Disabilities Profile (DDP), Acuity Assessment Instrument (AAI), and all accompanying documentation
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for seven years,

series_description: Records include a task list form and any related documentation to determine if nursing is required.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years.

series_description: MUI Investigative Reports in ITS System.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 25 years.

series_description: MUI Hotline calls and related records
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 25 years.

series_title: Developmental Center- Video Recordings preserved for investigation
series_description: Developmental Center- Video Recordings preserved for investigation
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 7 years.

series_title: Documentation of Statewide Patterns and Trends
series_description: Documentation of Statewide Patterns and Trends, Statewide meeting agendas
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 10 years

series_description: Department Contracts with Providers of Early Intervention Services
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 15 years.

series_description: Footage from motion activated cameras installed in Developmental Centers that is not specifically preserved for investigation.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 30 Days.

series_description: Certificates provided to individuals, providers, agency facilities, or county boards that have successfully passed Department review for certification, program, medication administration, certification qualifications, and/or services provided. This includes all applications for certifications and needed documentation for review.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years after certification ends.

series_title: Licensed Residential Facility Transfer and Discharge Appeals
series_description: Files pertaining to appeals under Ohio Ohio Adm. Code 5123-3-05 pertaining the admission, transfer or discharge of residents from licensed residential facilities.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for six years after closure of case.

series_description: Files pertaining to cases in the Court of Claims, State, or Federal Courts to which DODD or its employee, in the employee’s official capacity, is a party.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 10 years after case closed and time for potential appeals exhausted.

series_description: Legal Research Files Files containing legal research, internal correspondence and opinions in response to inquiries from Central Office staff, Developmental Center staff, county boards of DODD, providers, constituents, other state and federal agencies and attorneys.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Reports, Supporting documentation regarding unauthorized access, use or disclosure of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) or Protected Health Information (PHI)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 7 years after finalized report

series_description: Recordings made of DODD ITS Scrum meetings (Daily), Backlog Refinement meeting (Weekly), Sprint Planning meetings (Bi-weekly),Retro meeting (Bi-weekly) and Sprint Review meetings (Bi-weekly).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 7 days,

series_title: Adult Day Services Quality Pilot Program Application Processing Documentation
series_description: Documentation of process and standards for reviewing applications.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 8 years. ; Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically.

series_title: Adult Day Services Quality Pilot Technical Assistance
series_description: Communications requesting technical assistance with application or program
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 8 years.

series_title: Adult Day Services Quality Pilot Application Packet
series_description: Complete Application Packets for Adult Day Services Quality Pilot Program including staffing plans, job descriptions, provider agreements, disclosures, communications and any other documentation or communications submitted during provider application process.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 8 years.

series_title: Adult Day Services Quality Pilot Program Informational Documents
series_description: Adult Day Services Quality Pilot program documents including implementation manuals and internal meeting procedures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for 8 years.

series_description: Finalized provider compliance report including Plan of Correction submitted by provider.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 12 years.
